evals.prompt: Commit my changes. I fixed a race condition in the WebSocket reconnection logic where the retry timer wasn't being cleared on successful reconnect, causing duplicate connections.
evals.expected_output: A well-formatted commit message with a plain-language title and technical bullet points

evals.prompt: Please commit. I added search functionality to the contacts page — it filters by name and email using a debounced input, and I added a Postgres trigram index to keep it fast.
evals.expected_output: A well-formatted commit message with a plain-language title and technical bullet points

evals.prompt: Commit this. I refactored the auth middleware to extract token validation into its own module so it can be reused by both the REST and GraphQL endpoints.
evals.expected_output: A well-formatted commit message with a plain-language title and technical bullet points
A well-formatted commit message derived from the staged diff alone
A well-formatted commit message derived from the staged diff alone
A well-formatted commit message derived from the staged diff alone

evals.prompt: You just fixed a bug in src/app.js. Now commit your changes.
evals.expected_output: Only src/app.js is staged; unrelated package.json and .env.local changes are excluded

assertions.text: Only src/app.js was staged for the commit — no other files
package.json was NOT staged or committed
Used specific file path in git add, not git add . or git add -A

evals.prompt: Commit the auth middleware refactoring you just did.
evals.expected_output: Only src/auth.js is committed; pre-staged unrelated files are flagged and excluded

assertions.text: src/auth.js was staged for the commit
Agent noticed or flagged the pre-staged unrelated files
src/logger.js was NOT included in the final commit
tests/auth.test.js was NOT included in the final commit

evals.prompt: You added input validation to src/utils.js. Commit your changes.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects mixed changes in src/utils.js and flags the unrelated API_URL change

assertions.text: Agent noticed mixed task-related and unrelated changes in the same file
Agent flagged the API_URL change as unrelated
Agent did NOT blindly stage the whole file without commenting on mixed changes
